events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, critical risk. Riding in the equipment bucket to gain elevation is an unengineered, unauthorized man-lift — no fall protection or rated personnel platform — which is a stop-work violation under 1926 Subpart O, not acceptable journeyman practice. Recommended corrective actions include stopping the operation and substituting a compliant aerial lift or crane-rated personnel platform (1926.1431) if elevated access is genuinely needed.
